kinesisanalyticsv2.applicationreferenced: For a SQL-based Managed Service for Apache Flink application, describes the reference data source by providing the source information (Amazon S3 bucket name and object key name), the resulting in-application table name that is created, and the necessary schema to map the data elements in the Amazon S3 object to the in-application table.

kinesisanalyticsv2.applicationreferenced.Description: Describes the format of the data in the streaming source, and how each data element maps to corresponding columns created in the in-application stream.

Identifies the S3 bucket and object that contains the reference data. A Kinesis Data Analytics application loads reference data only once. If the data changes, you call the [UpdateApplication](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/apiv2/API_UpdateApplication.html) operation to trigger reloading of data into your application.
The name of the in-application table to create.
